skills.name: ss-a11y
skills.description: Audit a component or page for accessibility issues and fix them

skills.name: ss-audit
skills.description: Audit screens for UX issues using Nielsen's heuristics and modern mobile UX best practices

skills.name: ss-component
skills.description: Generate a new UI component following the StyleSeed design conventions

skills.name: ss-copy
skills.description: Generate UX microcopy (button labels, error messages, empty states, toasts) following a casual-but-polite voice and tone

skills.name: ss-feedback
skills.description: Add appropriate user feedback states (loading, success, error, empty) to a component or page

skills.name: ss-flow
skills.description: Design user flows and navigation structure following proven UX patterns

skills.name: ss-lint
skills.description: Quick automated lint — detects common design system violations in seconds

skills.name: ss-motion
skills.description: Apply a named StyleSeed motion to a component — either one of the 5 personality seeds (Spring/Silk/Snap/Float/Pulse × entrance/exit/hover/press/layout) or a distinctive keyword move from the motion library (toggle-flip, toggle-curtain, reveal-blur, pop-in, shimmer, …). Translates vibe words into framer-motion code from one source of truth.

skills.name: ss-page
skills.description: Scaffold a new mobile page/screen using the StyleSeed layout patterns

skills.name: ss-pattern
skills.description: Generate a composed UI pattern (card layout, list, form section, grid, etc.) using design system primitives

skills.name: ss-review
skills.description: Review UI code for design system compliance, accessibility, and best practices

skills.name: ss-score
skills.description: Score a UI file's design quality 0-100 against StyleSeed's design language — per-category breakdown, the worst offenders, and a prioritized fix list. A quantified version of /ss-review.

skills.name: ss-setup
skills.description: Interactive setup wizard — guides you step-by-step to configure the design system for your project

skills.name: ss-tokens
skills.description: View, add, or modify design tokens in the StyleSeed design system

skills.name: ss-update
skills.description: Update StyleSeed engine in your project — analyzes what's outdated and updates safely
